summary: Fixed two PDF output bugs: (1) Signal bar now shows all 3 categories (Screen-verified, Inferred, Resume-only) summing to 100%. Added inferred_pct reading, normalization logic, and 3rd bar with mid-opacity CSS. (2) Added compound-aware cross-section dedup: after LLM calls, strong-fit tradeoff needs are tokenized and questions with overlapping topics are filtered. Hyphenated compounds like 'end-to-end' count double for overlap scoring. Evidence question prefix changed from 'Confirms:' to 'Deepens:'. Section subtitle changed from 'probe' to 'explore'.
testing: Re-rendered from Hardik-FlowFuse decomposer output 3 times during iterative development. Final verification: signal bars = 76% + 2% + 22% = 100%. Zero topic overlap between strong-fit tradeoffs and remaining questions. Dedup correctly removes end-to-end/AI/reliability questions when those are strong-fit tradeoffs. Adapter validation passed.
